title: Transfer to DraveUp
subtitle: Consolidate your domains, save money on renewals, and manage everything from a single intuitive dashboard.

items.title: No Downtime
items.desc: Your website stays online during the transfer process.

items.title: Keep Remaining Time
items.desc: Any time left on your current registration is kept.

items.title: Free 1-Year Extension
items.desc: Every transfer includes an additional year of registration.

items.title: Free Privacy Protection
items.desc: Keep your personal information hidden from WHOIS.

items.q: How long does a domain transfer take?
items.a: Typically 5-7 days, depending on your current registrar.
No! As long as you don't change your nameservers during the transfer, your website will stay online.
Also known as an EPP code, it's a password for your domain that you get from your current registrar to prove you own it.

items.q: Do I lose the time I already paid for?
items.a: No! Any remaining time is carried over to DraveUp, plus you get an additional year.
